name: CSE — 06 Daily Digest

parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scores WHERE tier='HOT' AND scored_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS hot_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scores WHERE tier='WARM' AND scored_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS warm_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings WHERE scraped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS scraped_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scrape_errors WHERE occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS errors_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd),0) FROM claude_cost_log WHERE called_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS claude_cost_24h, (SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT id, address, city, state, asset_class, units, listing_price, equity_estimate_percent, overall_score, recommended_structure FROM v_hot_leads_24h ORDER BY overall_score DESC LIMIT 5) t) AS top_hot

_notes: Fires daily at 7am AZ (14:00 UTC, Arizona has no DST). Posts to email + Slack in parallel. If SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is unset the Slack node will error silently — that's fine, the email still ships. The digest_log INSERT acts as the idempotency record.
